rules.name: Arnold material has no connected textures
rules.message: Arnold material has no connected texture nodes.
rules.why: Untextured Arnold materials are valid for debug or flat-color lookdev, but production assets usually need explicit texture coverage before publish.

rules.name: Arnold material uses displacement
rules.message: Arnold material has displacement nodes in its network.
rules.why: Displacement-linked Arnold materials should be reviewed for farm-safe scale and subdivision settings before publish.

rules.name: Arnold plugin node missing when Arnold materials are present
rules.message: Scene contains Arnold materials but no Arnold options/plugin node.
rules.why: Arnold materials require an aiOptions node for predictable farm rendering and policy validation.

rules.name: Arnold material displacement requires review
rules.message: Arnold material has displacement linked in its shading network.
rules.why: Displacement-linked Arnold materials should be reviewed for farm-safe scale and subdivision before publish.

rules.name: Arnold material texture count exceeds budget
rules.message: Arnold material uses more textures than the configured Arnold texture budget.
rules.why: High texture counts increase IO, memory pressure, and review complexity. Arnold enrichment tracks texture count separately from generic graph lists for renderer-specific policy checks.

rules.name: Arnold material transmission depth exceeds budget
rules.message: Arnold material transmission depth exceeds the configured budget.
rules.why: High transmission depth increases render cost and can hide unstable material settings. Enriched Arnold metadata exposes transmission depth limits for policy review.

rules.name: Arnold stand-in nodes require review
rules.message: Scene contains Arnold stand-in/proxy nodes that require shading review.
rules.why: Arnold stand-ins can bypass local material graphs and hide missing textures or outdated proxies from routine shader validation.
